name: Dispute Resolver
description: Structure disputes, negotiations, mediation conversations, settlement options, and agreement summaries when parties disagree over facts, expectations, obligations, money, scope, behavior, or outcomes. Use when the core problem is reducing conflict into clear issues, separating facts from claims, surfacing interests and non-negotiables, generating workable resolution paths, or drafting precise next-step agreements.
not_for: licensed legal advice or courtroom strategy
one-sided attack messaging or coercive talking points
pretending every dispute is evenly supported by the evidence
typical_inputs: timeline of events and known evidence
agreed facts, disputed facts, and unknowns
relevant contract, policy, or procedural framework
